ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alchaincyf/zhangxuefeng-skill
Language: unknown
张雪峰.skill — 张雪峰的认知操作系统。高考志愿/考研/职业规划的实战思维框架。由女娲.skill生成。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bleedline/aimoneyhunter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bleedline/aimoneyhunter
Language: unknown
ai副业赚钱大集合，教你如何利用ai做一些副业项目，赚取更多额外收益。The Ultimate Guide to Making Money with AI Side Hustles: Learn how to leverage AI for some cool side gigs and rake in some extra cash. Check out the English version for more insights.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: byoungd/English-level-up-tips
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/byoungd/English-level-up-tips
Language: unknown
An advanced guide to learn English which might benefit you a lot 🎉 . 人生进阶指南 离谱的人生 离谱的英语学习指南/英语学习教程/英语学习/学英语

ns0:entry.ns0:title: farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/farhanashrafdev/90DaysOfCyberSecurity
Language: unknown
This repository contains a 90-day cybersecurity study plan, along with resources and materials for learning various cybersecurity concepts and technologies. The plan is organized into daily tasks, covering topics such as Network+, Security+, Linux, Python, Traffic Analysis, Git, ELK, AWS, Azure, and Hacking. The repository also includes a `LEARN.md

ns0:entry.ns0:title: firstcontributions/first-contributions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/firstcontributions/first-contributions
Language: unknown
🚀✨ Help beginners to contribute to open source projects

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iknowjason/Awesome-CloudSec-Labs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iknowjason/Awesome-CloudSec-Labs
Language: unknown
Awesome free cloud native security learning labs. Includes CTF, self-hosted workshops, guided vulnerability labs, and research labs.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
